acceptance_answers.which_connector_can_be_onboarded_first: GitHub, because it has the highest readiness score and lowest production-onboarding gap among external connectors, but only after scoped production credential authority and live connector evidence are created.
acceptance_answers.which_connector_has_highest_governance_r: LinkedIn, because it can affect public profile/content surfaces and requires strict human approval before any public action.

assessment_rules.fail_closed_assumption: If production credentials, live connector implementation, or external authority evidence is missing, production_ready is false.
production_ready_requires: governed production credentials or identity authority

generated_pr_body:
## PURPOSE
PB-040 assesses which USBAY connectors are ready for production onboarding after PB-039 without executing real external actions.

## RISK
A connector may appear usable in dry-run while still lacking production credentials, authority evidence, live implementation, or audit proof. Treating dry-run readiness as production readiness would create false governance state.

## POLICY LINK
AGENTS.md fail-closed, audit-first, network governance, human oversight, and secret/data hygiene rules. PB-038 evidence: governance/evidence/pb038/connector_framework_report.json. PB-039 evidence: governance/evidence/pb039/connector_orchestrator_simulation_report.json.

## REQUIRED APPROVALS
USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 review are required before merge. No live connector execution, account connection, external API call, public post, admin merge, or branch protection bypass is permitted.

## GOVERNANCE CHECKS
Validation must prove JSON parses, generated metadata is present, required PR body sections exist, diff hygiene passes, conflict markers are absent, and assessment conclusions are evidence-bound.

## AUDIT
PB-040 generates governance/evidence/pb040/connector_readiness_report.json and governance/evidence/pb040/connector_readiness_summary.md with connector scores, classifications, blocking gaps, risks, and recommended onboarding order.

## IMPACT
USBAY gains an evidence-bound connector onboarding sequence while preserving fail-closed production readiness assumptions.

## Decision
VERIFIED

## Status
READY_FOR_REVIEW
title: Connector Readiness Assessment
